exitus

Sets the exit code or exit expression for an entry point.

Syntax: incipit argumenta exitus

Category

entry

Related

  • [incipit](/corpus/incipit.html)
  • [incipiet](/corpus/incipiet.html)
  • [argumenta](/corpus/argumenta.html)

Examples

examples/corpus/exitus/exitus.fab (canonical · keyword)

Sets the exit code or exit expression for an entry point.

# exitus — CLI exit code on entry
#
# GRAMMAR:
#   entryModifier :← 'exitus' integer
#
# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
#   No incipit — declaration or test-runner surface only.
#
# BACKEND:
#   declaration-only entry modifier (whitelist: exitus/exitus.fab).
#

@ cli "exitus-smoke"
incipit argumenta args exitus 1 {
}
Sources
  • ["examples/corpus/exitus/exitus.fab"]
